untranslatable_reason: Signal requires custom moving skewness indicator (G) and spike detection logic not available in standard indicator library. The source uses a proprietary 4-step calculation involving moving deviation, double smoothing (b=0.05), and dynamic standard deviation multiplier (1.25). No allowed indicator matches this custom skewness measure. Threshold for spike detection marked AUTHOR_SILENT with no quantified value provided.
translation_notes: This signal cannot be accurately translated without the custom moving skewness (G) indicator and spike detection mechanism described in the source material. A placeholder directional logic using SMA crossover has been provided as a workaround, but this does not capture the original signal's intent. The signal is context-dependent (can trigger both long and short entries) based on spike magnitude. Authors Kaufman's original methodology requires implementation of the custom smoothed deviation calculation before this rule can be properly backtested.
